Name: Average time from SW-Checklist Completed to SW-Awaiting AE Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Total time between SW-Checklist Completed and SW-Awaiting AE Assignment across all variants
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Minimum time it takes for SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to occur after SW-Checklist Completed
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'SW-Checklist Completed' and activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment'

Name: Average duration of the period starting with SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and ending with SW-Initial Reviewer Selection
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-EIC Reject for cases where activity SW-EIC Reject occurs

Name: Total resolution time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment measured as the interval until the next distinct editorial activity (e.g., SW-Initial Reviewer Selection)
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'SW-Awaiting AE Assignment' and activity 'SW-Initial Reviewer Selection'

Name: Elapsed time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Reviewer Agreed in variants where reviewers are eventually assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-Reviewer Agreed for cases where activity SW-Reviewer Agreed occurs

Name: Average time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-AE Recommendation overdue in delayed-review variants

Name: Time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-Reviewer Selection is due in 1 week, capturing early scheduling behavior

Name: Total time between SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation in complex review paths involving multiple revision rounds
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation for cases where activity SW-Awaiting AE Recommendation occurs

Name: Minimum time from SW-Awaiting AE Assignment to SW-EIC Accept in accepted manuscript variants
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity SW-Awaiting AE Assignment and activity SW-EIC Accept for cases where activity SW-EIC Accept occurs

Name: Average cycle time of SW-Awaiting AE Assignment defined as the duration from its start until the initiation of reviewer assignment (SW-AE Assign Reviewers)
